objective: Execute Stage 2 of the typecheck roadmap: remove false TS2367 diagnostics caused by environment constants and compile-time macro literals while preserving Bun build output behavior.
avoid_scope: Do not replace compile-time feature() gates with runtime-only helpers when dead-code elimination matters.
Do not make unrelated source edits outside the active slice.
Do not run git add or git commit.

checker_loss.target_state: STAGE-2-ENV-MACROS TS2367 diagnostics near zero with build passing and macro dead-code behavior preserved.
checker_loss.actual_state: Fresh checker rerun confirms Stage 1 import/declaration diagnostics remain cleared. The RateLimitTier slice added the Claude Max 5x and 20x tier literals to the central OAuth union and ambient mirror, clearing both /upgrade RateLimitTier TS2367 diagnostics. npm run build passes. Full tsc still exits 2 with 458 downstream errors. The only remaining TS2367 diagnostic is the SDK content-block union mismatch in src/services/api/logging.ts.
blocking_reasons: The remaining src/services/api/logging.ts diagnostic belongs with SDK content-block union handling for Stage 3 unless later analysis proves otherwise.

remaining_stage2_diagnostics: src/services/api/logging.ts(677,11): TS2367 SDK content block union mismatch

next_candidates: Promote the remaining src/services/api/logging.ts SDK content-block TS2367 to Stage 3 message/content-block handling.
Confirm Stage 2 can be marked complete once the main agent accepts that no macro-related TS2367 diagnostics remain.
